title: 8 Ways a Godly Man Leads Before He Has a Title
caption:
Leadership isn't a title. It's a posture.

The men worth following are building the habit before anyone gives them permission — absorbing the cost, telling the truth, naming what no one else will say.

God watches how you lead before you have a platform. The character you build in the margins is the character He hands you the room for.

Save this. Pick one to practice this week.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #christianity #discipleship #mensministry
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
